_note: Live derived metrics — updated each agent session. This is the source of truth for data-derived estimates. Do not use dashboard.json for TDEE or rate-of-loss; use this file. When any value changes, update it here in the same session.

tdee.method: back-calculated from Phase 1 weight loss (10 May 2026)
tdee.derivation: ~2.0 kg true fat loss (3.2 kg total minus ~1.2 kg water/glycogen) over 27 days = ~570 kcal/day deficit. Avg actual intake ~1500-1550 kcal/day → implied TDEE ~2070-2120.
tdee.algorithm_note: Mifflin-St Jeor / formula. Data-derived estimate supersedes this.
tdee.dashboard_note: Left unchanged as conservative anchor; this file's estimate is used for planning.
tdee.cardio_free_note: Gym + dog walks only. Structured cardio (runs, rides, stairs) is logged separately and treated as additive to the weekly deficit.

phase.live_target_note: Revised 10 May 2026 — original 82 kg target hit 28 days early. 80 kg is the Phase 2 insurance target.
phase.loss_rate_note: Gross rate includes early water/glycogen flush. True fat loss rate estimated ~0.5 kg/wk after adjusting ~1.2 kg water from the first 2 weeks.

vo2_max.note: Apple Watch estimate. Improving — weight loss (85→81.9 kg) + fitness both contributing. Target: 40+ by Sep 2026.
